name: Chandan
sloka: स्वादु तिक्तं कषायं पीतं श्वेतं सुगन्धि तत् | शीतलं पित्तदाहघ्नं चन्दनं प्रोच्यते बुधैः ||
classification_of_gana: चरक: दाहप्रशमन, तृष्णानिग्रहण, वर्ण्य, कण्डूघ्न, विषघ्न

external_morphology.habitat: Forest of Karnataka and Tamil Nadu
details: Leaves: 4-6 cm long, elliptic lanceolate subacute, entire margin
Flower: Brownish purple, perianth is companulate

karma.dosha_karma: पित्तशामक, कफशामक (कटु विपाक, तिक्त रस). Agryakarma: on application removes bad odour, relieves burning sensation, acts as coolant.

rogaghnata: दाह, तृष्णा, रक्तपित्त, त्वकविकार, कुष्ठ, विसर्प, ज्वर, कृमी (Daha, Trishna, Raktapitta, Twak vikara, Kushtha, Visarpa, Jwara, Krumi)
amayika_prayoga: रक्तातिसार (Raktatisar) = चंदन चूर्ण + Sugar + Honey + Tandulodaka
रक्तार्ष (Raktarsha) = चंदन रस + शुंठी
पित्तजज्वर (Pittaja Jwara) = चंदन कषाय + Sugar + Honey
बहुमुत्र मेहा (Bahumutra Meha) = क्वाथ की अर्द्धन + चंदन
छर्दी (Chardi) = चंदन चूर्ण + Dhatri rasa
marga: Ext. application = लेप, तैल | Int. = क्वाथ
kalpana: Marma Gutika - Cardiac and liver disease
varieties: भावप्रकाश: श्वेत चंदन (Shweta), पीत चंदन (Peeta), रक्त चंदन (Rakta / Kuchandana)

name: Ela
sloka: सूक्ष्मा उपकुञ्चिका कुन्ती कोरङ्गी त्रुटिः | एला सूक्ष्मा कफश्वासकासअर्शोमूत्रकृच्छ्रहृत् | रसे तु कटुका शीता लघ्वी वातहरी मता ||

external_morphology.habitat: Mysore, Kung, Travancore, Cochin, Lanka and Burma; cultivated mainly in Western Ghats (South India)
details: Flowers: in panicle (produced directly from the root stock)
Seeds: 15-20 dark reddish brown to black hard seeds

phytoconstituents: Volatile oil 2-8%, seed oil - cineol, terpineol, limonene, terpinene

rasa_panchaka.rasa: Sthula Ela: Katu | Laghu Ela: Katu, Madhura
rasa_panchaka.guna: Sthula Ela: Laghu, Ruksha | Laghu Ela: Laghu, Sukshma, Snigdha
rasa_panchaka.virya: Sthula Ela: Ushna | Laghu Ela: Sheeta
rasa_panchaka.vipaka: Sthula Ela: Katu | Laghu Ela: Madhura

karma.dosha_karma: Tridoshahara. कफघ्न = Katu Rasa, Laghu Guna. पित्तघ्न = Madhur Vipaka, Sheeta Virya. वातघ्न = Madhur Anupada, Vishravana Guna, Madhur Vipaka.
karma.karma: रोचक, पाचक, कण्ठशोधन, हृद्य, वातशमन, छर्दीनिग्रहण, दुर्गन्धिनाशन, दिपन, तृष्णाहर, रक्त आर्शहर, मुत्रकृच्छ्रहर

rogaghnata: Trishna, अरुची (Aruchi), Agnimandhya, Adhma, Hridaydaubalya, Kasa, Swasa, Mutrakruchra, Daha, Arsha (Rakta)
amayika_prayoga: Ela churna + Aja dugdh (भावना) - अंजन in तिमिर (Timira)
Ela churna with मद्य (Madya) = Udavata
Ela churna + पिंपली + शुंठी + Jeevak with Dadim स्वरस = कण्ठगत रोग
Equal quantity of Ela and Pippali moola churna + Ghee = हृद्य रोग (Hridaya roga)
varieties: Type: Malabari - Mysori. Sukshma Ela (Elettaria cardamomum), Bruhat Ela (Amomum subulatum)
research_updates: Effect on B.P. (lowering) and anti-ulcer activity

name: Bhringraj
sloka: भृङ्गराजः कटुस्तिक्ष्णो रूक्षोष्णः कफवातनुत् | केश्यस्त्वच्यः कृमिश्वासकासशोथआमपाण्डुनुत् || त्वच्या रसायनी बाल्याः कुष्ठनेत्र शिरो अतिनुत् ||

external_morphology.habitat: India, marshy places, grows rapidly in rainy season
details: Leaf: Ramal, cauline, simple opposite elliptic-lanceolate, reticulate venation

karma.dosha_karma: Kaphahara = Katu, Tikta Rasa; Vataghna = Ushna Veerya, Laghu, Ruksha Guna
karma.karma: केश्य, त्वच्य, केशरञ्जन, यकृतोत्तेजक, नेत्र्य, रसायन, बल्य, शिरःशूलहर, विषघ्न

rogaghnata: Kasa, Swasa, Ama, Pandu, Kustha, Shirogata, Chakshuroga, Yakrutroga, Pliha vruddhi
amayika_prayoga: Kansis bhasma + Bhringaraj swaras = Kesharanjan
Goat milk + Bhringaraj swaras (Nasya) = Headache (Suryavarta)
Castor oil + Bhringaraj swaras (internally) = Intestinal worm infection
Bhringaraj kalka (external application) = Swollen area, abscess, throat infection, asthma, cough, cold, elephantiasis
Bhringaraj churna + Honey = Throat infection, asthma, cough, cold
research_updates: Alcoholic extract of Eclipta alba shows in-vitro antioxidant and anticancer activity without exhibiting toxicological effects

name: Bilwa
sloka: तिक्तं शाण्डिल्यशैलूषो मालूरश्रीफलादपि | श्रीफलस्तुवरस्तिक्तः ग्राही रूक्षोअग्निदीपनः | वातश्लेष्महरो बल्यो मधुरूष्णश्च पाचकः ||

synonyms.meaning: Fruit of Bilwa is having aroma

details: Leaf: Palmately compound, trifoliate, petiolate, alternate, net veined
Flowers: Pedicellate, bisexual, sweet scented, petals white colour

phytoconstituents: Marmelosin, essential oils, tannic acid, rutin, aegeline, fatty acid

rasa_panchaka.rasa: Apakwa Phala: Kashaya, Tikta | Pakwa Phala: Madhura | Mula: Kashaya, Tikta
rasa_panchaka.guna: Apakwa Phala: Laghu, Snigdha | Pakwa Phala: Guru | Mula: Laghu, Ruksha
rasa_panchaka.virya: Apakwa Phala: Ushna | Pakwa Phala: Sheeta | Mula: Ushna
rasa_panchaka.vipaka: Apakwa Phala: Katu | Pakwa Phala: Madhura | Mula: Katu

karma.karma: Root: Shothahara, Shulahara | Stem: Sangrahi, Pramehaghna | Apakwa Phala: Deepan, Pachan, Grahi, Hrudya | Pakwa Phala: Vishtambhi | Pushpa: Atisarahara, Chardighna

rogaghnata: Root: Shotha, Shula | Leaf: Prameha | Stem: Kasa, Archi | Apakwa Phala: Atisara | Flowers: Trishna, Chardi
amayika_prayoga: Atisara = Apakwa Phala
Arshas (Piles) = Sitz bath with warm decoction of Bilwa
Medoroga = Kwatha of Brihatpanchamoola
Raktatisara = Bilwa Phala + Jaggery + Honey + Oil

name: Gambhari
sloka: काश्मरी तुवरा तिक्ता वीर्योष्णा मधुरा गुरुः | दीपनी पाचिनी मेध्या शोथदोषत्रयापहा | दाह तृष्णाऽरुचि शूल कर्षी विबन्ध ज्वरापहा | तस्याः फलं बृहणं वृष्यं गुरु केश्यं रसायनम् ||

details: Habit: Large deciduous tree, 20 m height
Leaves: Large, tomentose underneath, cordate-ovate, acuminate

phytoconstituents: Gmelanol, butyric acid, tartaric acid, gcliosone

rasa_panchaka.rasa: Root: Tikta, Kashaya, Madhura | Fruit: Madhura

karma.dosha_karma: त्रिदोषशामक (Tridoshashamak). Root: Ushna Virya = Deepan; Ushna Virya + Balya = Anuloman; Ushna + Guru + Madhura Anupaka = Vataja Rasa.
karma.karma: Root bark: Shodhan (Garbhashaya Shotha), Vishaghna (snake and scorpion bite, internal and external use) | Fruit: Sheeta - Pittaghna, Trishnashamak; Madhura Rasa/Vipaka/Virya - Sandhaniya (hairline fracture etc), Balya - Rasayana, Urakshata | Ripe fruit: Sheeta - Raktapittaghna, Pittaja Jwara - Daha, Trishna; Madhura Vipaka, Sheeta, Guru, Snigdha - Garbhasthapana, Stanyajanan, Vrishya; Balya - Samanya Daurbalya; Mutrajanan and Mutrakruchra | Leaves: Mutrajanan (Mutrakruchra); Snigdha, Sheeta - Jwara, Shiroshoola and Daha (Patra Lepa) | General Karma: Deepan, Pachan, Anuloman, Shothahara, Balya, Mutrajanan, Stanyajanan, Shamana

rogaghnata: Agnimandhya, Atisara, Vibandha, Shotha, Urahkshata, Daurbalya, Mutrakruchra, Vatarakta, Gatikroga, Raktapitta
amayika_prayoga: Patha Swaras + Mishri = Mutrakruchra
Patra Lepa - Shirahshoola | Puyameha
Phala Yusha + Sugar - Raktatisara = Bastishotha
Flower and Fruit kashaya + Shamali - useful as diet
Gambhari Fruit + Yashtimadhu Siddha Ghrita + Ghrita = Garbhashushkta
Gambhari Phala Majja Kwatha + Mishri = Trishna, Daha, Jwara
Majja Kwatha + Madhu = Raktapitta
Ripe fruit powder + Milk = Sheetapitta
varieties: Substitute: Gambhari fruit used as substitute for Grapes / Raisins (भावप्रकाश)

name: Arjuna
sloka: ककुभो शीतलो हृद्यः क्षतक्षयविषापहा | मेदोलमेहत्वग्दोषान् हन्ति ज्वरः कफापहकृत ||
classification_of_gana: चरक: उदर्दप्रशमन, कषायस्कन्ध (Allergic skin condition, ringworm infection)

details: Bark: Smooth, grey; sapwood reddish white; heartwood brown
Leaves: Subopposite, 10-15 cm long, oblong / elliptic-oblong
Inflorescence: Short axillary spikes, terminal panicle

phytoconstituents: Bark: calcium and magnesium salts, flavonoids (arjunic acid, tannins, arjunaglucosides)

karma.dosha_karma: विशेष: कफहर - कटु विपाक; पित्तहर - शीत वीर्य; हृद्य (Kaphahara - Katu Vipaka; Pittahara - Sheeta Virya; Hrudya)
karma.karma: हृद्य, वर्णहर, भग्नसंधानकर (Hrudroga, Pitta-Kapha Vrana) | Raktapittahara - bleeding disorders | Shramahara, Trishnahara

rogaghnata: Hrudroga, Kshata, Prameha, Bhagna, Asrujita, Pitta-Kapha Vrana
amayika_prayoga: Arjuna Kwatha + Churna = Osteoporosis
Arjuna + Godhuma + Oil, Ghee, Guda, Milk = Cardiac disease, Osteoporosis
Kwatha of Arjuna = Shukrameha
Kalka of Arjuna (Swaras) + Honey = Twakroga
Arjuna Churna + Laksha + Guggul + Ghee = Bhagna (internal use)
varieties: Types: White - Arjuna; Black - Kukubha. Adulteration: Terminalia alata, Terminalia tomentosa

name: Haridra
sloka: हरिद्रा कटुका तिक्ता रूक्षोष्णा कफपित्तनुत् | वर्ण्या त्वग्दोषमेहास्त्रशोथपाण्डुव्रणापहा ||
classification_of_gana: चरक: लेखनीय, कुष्ठघ्न, कण्डूघ्न, विषघ्न, तिक्तस्कन्ध, शिरोविरेचन

details: Named निशा / रजनी owing to its yellow coloured rhizome

phytoconstituents: 5% volatile oil, curcuminoids (curcumin). Rhizome volatile oil contains mono and sesquiterpenes such as α-pinene, phellandrene, camphor, camphene, zingiberene, curcumenes

karma.karma: वर्ण्य, त्वच्य, प्रमेहहर, शोथहर, व्रणहर, कण्डूघ्न, विषघ्न, कुष्ठघ्न, केशिनी, रुच्य

rogaghnata: शीतपित्त, कण्डू, कामला, श्वास, कुष्ठ, तिमिर, Naktandya, पाण्डु, प्रमेह, Dadru Kustha (ringworm infestation), Shlipada (Filariasis), वातरक्त (Gout), Panduroga (Anaemia), Kaphaja Trishna
amayika_prayoga: प्रमेह (Prameha) = Haridra powder + Honey + Amlaki, mixed in equal quantity
Dadru Kustha (ringworm infestation) = Haridra powder + cow's urine + jaggery
वातरक्त (Gout) = Kwatha of Haridra + Amrita taken with honey (kapha-dominant Vatarakta)
Panduroga (Anaemia) = Haridra + Triphala churna + Ghee and Honey
Kaphaja Trishna = Water with Haridra mixed with Honey and Sugar
varieties: आ. प्र.: Haridra, Amrahaidra, Vanaharidra, Daruharidra. डल्हण: Pinda Haridra, Daruharidra
research_updates: Antitumor activity in human colon cancer

name: Daruharidra
sloka: दार्वी दारुहरिद्रा स्यात् कटुष्णा व्रणमेहनुत् | कर्णनेत्रमुखोद्भूतां रुजं कण्डूं च नाशयेत् ||

details: Grows to a height of 2-3 metres
Twigs whitish to pale yellowish-brown in colour
Bark pale brown from outside and deep yellow from inside, deeply furrowed, rough
Leaves obovate or elliptic, entire or spinous toothed

phytoconstituents: Berberine, quaternary ammonium salt of isoquinoline alkaloid

karma.karma: Shothahara, Kanda Kushthahara, Visarpahara, Vishahara, Kaphahara, Abhishyandihara

rogaghnata: Shotha, Kanda Kushtha, Visarpa, Visha, Abhishyanda, Skin diseases (Kustha)
amayika_prayoga: Skin diseases (Kustha) - Rasanjana with Gomutra administered for treatment of Kustha

name: Haritaki
sloka: हरितकी पञ्चरसा अलवणा तुवरा परम | रुक्षा उष्ण दीपनी मेध्या स्वादुपाक रसायनी || चर्तिता वर्धयत्यग्निं पेषिता मलाशोधिनी | स्विन्ना संग्राहिणी पथ्या भृष्टा प्रोक्ता त्रिदोषनुत् ||
classification_of_gana: चरक: प्रजास्थापन, वयस्थापन, कुष्ठघ्न, कासघ्न, अर्शोघ्न

details: Large sized deciduous tree, height up to 80 ft

phytoconstituents: Important source of tannin - contains up to 32% tannin; on hydrolysis yields chebulic acid, d-galloyl glucose, sorbitol, chebulic acid, gallic acid

karma.karma: स्रोतोविशोधनी, रसायन, मेध्या, दीपनी, पाचिनी, लघु, संग्राहिणी, त्रिदोषनुत्

rogaghnata: आनाह, आध्मान, अश्मरी, विबन्ध, श्वास, कास, अरुची, कुष्ठ, मेदरोग, शोथ, केश्य, हृद्य, पाण्डु, अग्निमांद्य; used as a Rasayana
amayika_prayoga: Parinama Shula (duodenal ulcer) - Haritaki taken with jaggery and sugar
वातव्याधि (Vatavyadhi) = Haritaki + cow's urine
अतिस्वेद (Atisweda) = Paste of Haritaki
विबन्ध (Constipation) = Haritaki + Jaggery
छर्दी (Vomiting) = Haritaki + Honey
अर्श (Piles) = Haritaki + Cow's urine + Jaggery
वातरक्त (Vatarakta) = Haritaki churna + Jaggery
प्रमेह (Prameha) = हरीतकी + हरिद्रा + शर्करा
varieties: Types: विजया, रोहिणी, पूतना, अमृता, अभया, जीवन्ती, चेतकी. Ritu Haritaki (seasonal Anupana to achieve Rasayana Karma): Shishira (late winter) - Pippali; Vasanta (spring) - Madhu; Grishma (summer) - Guda; Varsha (rainy season) - Saindhava Lavana; Sharad (Autumn) - Sharkara; Hemanta (early winter) - Shunthi
research_updates: Anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, free radical scavenging and healing properties
Controls blood glucose and manages Type 2 diabetes

name: Hingu
sloka: हिङ्गुष्णं पाचनं रुच्यं तीक्ष्णं वातकफापहम् । शूलगुल्मोदरा नाहकृमिघ्नं पित्तवर्धनम् ॥ भा. प्र

details: Leaves: pubescent when young, ovate shape

rogaghnata: अग्निमांध्य, शूल, गुल्म, कृमि, कास, श्वास
amayika_prayoga: मदात्यय = Hingu & maricha given with wine
कर्णशूल = hingvadi taila

name: Jambu
amayika_prayoga: रक्तपित्त = Jambu + Amra + Arjuna
मधुमेह = Jambu seeds powder daily

name: Jatamansi
sloka: जटामांसी तु तुवरा शीतला क्रान्तिकारका बल्या कदर्वी स्वादुतिक्ता

details: Flower: Rosy, pale pink, blue coloured

rogaghnata: मानसिक विकार, ज्वर, दाह, त्वक विकार
amayika_prayoga: कुष्ठ = paste from mansi with urine and alkali
केशवर्धनार्थ = Paste with milk and honey
